title: 10L XSA + EMA + Partial RoPE + LN Scale (val_bpb: 1.1366)
body:
## Summary
- 10-layer GPT with XSA on last 4 layers, EMA (0.997), Partial RoPE (16/64), LN Scale
- Int5 MLP / Int6 attention, FP16 embeds, 3.2% pruning, zstd-22
- SmearGate + BigramHash(10240), orthogonal init, Muon optimizer

## Results
| Seed | val_bpb | Artifact | Steps |
|------|---------|----------|-------|
| 42 | 1.1365 | 15,759,319 | 6491 |
| 1337 | 1.1366 | 15,820,386 | 6520 |

- 8xH100 SXM, 600s, ~92ms/step
- PyTorch 2.7.0 + FlashAttention 2.8.3
- No TTT, no test-time adaptation
- Sliding window eval stride=64
